globalNews.title: Iran steps up claim to control Strait of Hormuz
globalNews.summary: Iran publishes a map claiming "armed forces oversight" across more than 22,000 sq km of the waterway.

globalNews.title: China says US should stop 'threats' against Cuba after ex-leader charged
globalNews.summary: It comes after the US charged Cuba's ex-leader with murder, the latest move putting pressure on the regime.

globalNews.title: Air France and Airbus found guilty of manslaughter over 2009 plane crash
globalNews.summary: The companies were found guilty by a French court over an air disaster which killed 228 people.

globalNews.title: Charges dismissed against official at school where 6-year-old shot teacher
globalNews.summary: The child fired a single shot at a teacher, who had to have surgery after the incident in 2023.

globalNews.title: Gaza flotilla activists deported from Israel as backlash over treatment grows
globalNews.summary: On Thursday, the UK confirmed it had summoned Israel's top diplomat in Britain to express its "condemnation" of the incident.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin due '5%+' move as analysis stays bullish on BTC price outlook
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin should shift 5% or more "soon" with $77,000 staying the focus amid mixed messages over the latest US-Iran peace deal plans.

cryptoNews.title: IG Europe taps Bitpanda to expand crypto trading across Europe
cryptoNews.summary: IG Group, which launched spot crypto in the UK last year, is bringing the service to European investors through Bitpanda’s infrastructure.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Hyperliquid whale won’t close HYPE short despite $22M unrealized loss
cryptoNews.summary: HYPE’s rally is flashing exhaustion near its record-high resistance, raising the risk of a 20% pullback toward the $51.5–$45 support zone.

cryptoNews.title: Kraken moves closer to UAE launch after Dubai regulatory approval
cryptoNews.summary: Kraken’s parent company, Payward, received preliminary approval from Dubai's VARA, paving the way for UAE dirham funding, margin and OTC trading and institutional access via Kraken Prime.

aiNews.title: Spotify launches an ElevenLabs-powered audiobook creation tool
aiNews.summary: Spotify is releasing new audiobook plans later this year

aiNews.title: Spotify takes on Google’s NotebookLM with its new app
aiNews.summary: Spotify is releasing the new desktop app as a research preview in more than 20 markets

aiNews.title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
aiNews.summary: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts

aiNews.title: Hark raises $700M Series A for its secretive “universal” AI interface
aiNews.summary: Brett Adcock's new AI startup is now valued at $6 billion by its investors.

aiNews.title: The Path, founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, hopes to offer safer AI therapy
aiNews.summary: The Path says its AI model has scored 95 on the mental health safety AI benchmark, Vera-MH. This compares to a top score of 65 for the consumer bots.
